description: Loading screen config. Each stage has a label + 4-5 random meme variants. Frontend picks one randomly per stage. No AI needed - hardcoded.

behavior.total_duration_seconds: Match actual backend processing time. If backend is faster than expected, add minimum display time per stage (1.5s) so users can read the memes.
behavior.text_transition: Fade out 300ms -> swap text -> fade in 300ms
behavior.progress_bar: Smooth animate between stage progress values

stages.label: INITIALIZING
memes: GM anon. Time to find out if you're based or cringe.
Not financial advice. But your strategy might need some.
WAGMI? Let's verify that claim.
ser... are you sure you want to see this?

stages.label: CONNECTING TO BINANCE
memes: CZ sends his regards.
Funds are safu. Your ego might not be.
4 is not enough. Loading 10 tokens.
Pinging Binance... they didn't freeze our account (yet).

stages.label: LOADING HISTORICAL DATA
memes: Loading 168 candles per event... still less painful than watching your portfolio.
Downloading 10/10 crash data... $19B liquidated. Hope you weren't one of them.
Fetching price history... every red candle is a lesson you probably ignored.
10 tokens x 10 events x 168 candles = 16,800 data points of truth.

stages.label: WARMING UP AI AGENT
memes: Your AI agent is reading your strategy... trying not to laugh.
AI is calibrating... it's seen worse. Actually, maybe not.
Injecting your risk parameters... the AI just raised an eyebrow.
Loading model weights... heavier than your bags.

stages.label: EXECUTING TRADES
memes: AI just opened a 40x long... wait, that's James Wynn's strategy, not yours.
Executing across 10 historical events... your strategy is already sweating.
Trading through the 10/10 crash... 1.6 million accounts got rekt that day.
Your agent is panic selling... just kidding. Maybe.
Buy high sell low protocol activated... oh wait, that's not your config? Sure about that?

stages.label: SURVIVING THE CRASHES
memes: Simulating Feb 2025... Bybit just lost $1.5B. Your agent is coping.
Running through the 2026 crash... BTC broke $70K to the downside. Pain.
Your strategy during 10/10: 'This is fine.'
Testing survival... the market doesn't care about your feelings.

stages.label: CALCULATING SCORE
memes: Calculating Sharpe ratio... it's trying its best.
Crunching numbers... hopium levels critical.
Computing your win rate... it's a number. That's all we'll say for now.
Measuring max drawdown... you might want to sit down.
Few understand what's about to happen to your confidence.

stages.label: MATCHING TRADER PERSONALITY
memes: Comparing you to GCR... it's not looking great.
You trade like... actually, let's wait for the full report.
Cross-referencing with 13 archetypes... one of them is called 'FOMO Warrior'. Just saying.
Determining if you're a Contract King or a Paper Hands Shill... suspense.

stages.label: GENERATING REPORT
memes: Report almost ready. No refunds.
Your trader personality has been determined. It cannot be unseen.
Rendering your ego in chart form...
This is gentlemen.

stages.label: COMPLETE
memes: Score calculated. Brace yourself.
ngmi or gmi? Scroll down to find out.
The market has spoken. Let's see the verdict.

implementation_notes.how_to_use: On each stage transition: pick a random index from that stage's memes array. Display with fade transition.
implementation_notes.stage_trigger: Trigger stage transitions based on actual backend progress events if available. If backend doesn't send progress, use fixed timers as fallback.
implementation_notes.minimum_display_time: 1500ms per stage minimum, so users can actually read the text
